title: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpea curry with deep-fried fluffy bread. A Punjabi favourite.

tips: Plan ahead - soaking takes 8-12 hours. Cooking takes another 30-45 minutes
subSteps: Soak chickpeas in water overnight (8-12 hours).
Drain water completely.
Add fresh water and bring to a boil.
Pressure cook for 4-5 whistles until completely soft.
Drain excess water but reserve 1 cup for the curry.
Finely chop onions into medium pieces.
Mince ginger and garlic together.
Slit green chillies lengthwise.
Crush or finely chop tomatoes.
Measure out cumin seeds, garam masala, red chilli powder, and turmeric.
Keep salt ready.
Have oil measured and ready.

steps.instruction: Prepare chickpeas and cook until soft.
tips: Cooked chickpeas can be made a day ahead and stored in refrigerator.
subSteps: Soak chickpeas overnight (8-12 hours).
Drain and add fresh water.
Pressure cook for 4-5 whistles until completely soft.
Drain excess water, reserve 1 cup chickpea water.
Set aside.

tips: The curry should be medium consistency — not too thick, not too watery.
subSteps: Heat oil in a large pan, add cumin seeds.
Add finely chopped onions and cook until golden brown.
Add ginger, garlic, and green chillies, cook 2 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes and cook until oil separates.
Add all spices: turmeric, red chilli powder, garam masala.
Cook spices for 1 minute in oil.
Add cooked chickpeas and reserved water.
Simmer for 10-12 minutes until flavors blend.
Adjust salt and spice according to taste.

seo.metaTitle: Chole Bhature Recipe — Authentic Punjabi Style
seo.metaDescription: Master this classic Punjabi recipe with step-by-step instructions for spiced chickpea curry.
